name: team_task_store
description: Store a new task in the team's shared task memory. Use this to create and track tasks that need to be completed by team members. Tasks are stored with unique IDs, status tracking, priority levels, and metadata for proper orchestration.

task_title.description: Brief, descriptive title for the task

task_description.description: Detailed description of what needs to be accomplished

estimated_duration.description: Estimated time to complete (e.g., '30 minutes', '2 hours', '1 day')

required_capabilities.description: List of capabilities/functions needed to complete this task (e.g., ['github', 'slack', 'code_analysis'])

dependencies.description: List of task IDs that must be completed before this task can start

deadline.description: Optional deadline for task completion (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.task_title: Analyze GitHub issues for project XYZ
parameters.task_description: Review all open issues in project XYZ repository, categorize by priority, and identify patterns

examples.name: Store code review task with dependencies

parameters.task_description: Perform code review on pull request #42, test changes, and merge if approved
